New Delhi, the 25th May, 2001 7 A GLS.R. 386(E).—-:In exercise oEthe powers conferred by subisectiond), read with clause (b) of sub—section (2) of section 30 and section 30A, of the Railway Claims. Tribunal Act, 1987(54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Rules, 1989, namely 2» 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and -- 2 of 3 -- [until—evens] _' WWW: swim Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice-Chairman and Members) Amendment, Rules, 2001. (2) They. shall be deemed to have come into force on the Ist day of January,l996. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice~Chairrnan and Members) Rules,l989, in Rule 8, for sub—rule (2), the following sub-rule be substituted, namely:~- "(2) Pension under sub-mle‘(l)shall be calculated at the rate of four thousand seven hundred and sixteen per annum for each completed year of service and irrespective of the number of years of service in the Tribunal, the maximum . pension shall not exceed rupees twenty three thousand five hundred and eighty, subject to the condition that the aggregate amount of pension payable under this rule, together with the amount of any pension payable under this rule, together with the amount of any pension including commuted portion of pension, if any, drawn or entitled to be drawn, while holding oflice in the Tribunal shall not exceed rupees one lakh and fifty six thousand per annum” ' mm In view of revision of pension payable to retired Central Government employees. as a result of implementation of recommendations of the 5”1 Central Pay Commission, it has been decided to revise the pension payable to the retired Chairman, Vice—Chairman and Members of the Tribunal with eifect from the 15‘ January, 1996, i.e. the date from which the pension payable to the Central Government employees has been revised: It is, therefore, necessary to amend sub- rule (2) of rule 8 of the Railway Claims Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chairman, Vice—Chairman and Members) Rules, 1989 with effect from the 15“ January ,1996, It is certified that none will be adversely affected by the aforesaid amendment being given retrospective effect. [No. 94/TC(RCT)/2—2/Pt.] PADMAKSHI RAHEJA, Executive Director, Public Grievances, Railway Board. Footnotet— The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification No. GSR. 844(E) dated 19'h September, 1989 and subsequently amended by notification No.GSR.726(E) dated 6“1 Decemberl991, GSR 185(E) dated 11“1 Aprill996 and GSR 733(E) dated 2151‘ September 2000.
